subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! A mighty sacrifice hath appeared upon the earth, the like of which the eye of creation hath never beheld [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه قربانی عظیم در ارض ظاهر شبه آنرا عین ابداع ندیده
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
